title: Vor'Na'Tu

The '''Vor'Na'Tu''' was an ancient [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi artifact/Legends|artifact]]. [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] took the Vor'Na'Tu' with him into exile on [[Krant]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], it was discovered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and taken to [[Hanoon|Geddes]]. Shen-Jon joined with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to [[Battle of Geddes|recover]] the artifact. Shen-Jon was forced to destroy it to keep it out of the hands of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], but lost his life in the process. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] received a vision from Shen-Jon, directing her to return to the [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] Hanoon to destroy the shards. She went with her brother, the Jedi [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to [[Battle of Hanoon|destroy]] the remnants of the Vor'Na'Tu.

==History==
===Exile===
The Vor'Na'Tu was a [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]]. The [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] held the Vor'Na'Tu in secret during his self-imposed exile on [[Krant]]. For over twenty years the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] hid the powerful [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] until<ref name="SW:GB" /> around [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> when the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Utric Sandov]] informed [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] that an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] landing force managed to recover the artifact.<ref name="SW:GB" />

With the assistance of a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] warriors whom he met on Krant, Shen-Jon led an [[Battle of Geddes|assault]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Hanoon|Geddes]] where the Imperial forces had hid the Vor'Na'Tu.<ref name="SW:GB" />

After destroying the [[Sith temple/Legends|Sith Temple]] guarding the crystal, Shen-Jon attempted to flee, but was [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|cut down]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who was sent to retrieve the artifact for his master, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Shen-Jon, fearing the results of the Vor'Na'Tu falling into the Emperor's hands, shattered the item into four pieces, rendering it useless to Vader before Shen-Jon [[Death/Legends|succumbed to his wounds]]. His sacrifice allowed the Rebels to escape Vader.<ref name="SW:GB" />

===Shards of Vor'Na'Tu===
[[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, as Geddes was [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] and colonized as Hanoon, the colonists found the shards and held them as valuable relics in their [[City/Legends|cities]]. However, Shen-Jon's [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] still worried about its potential power.<ref name="SW:GB" /> In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="EA" /> he warned Organa, and a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] task force led by her and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Battle of Hanoon|returned]] to the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] to retrieve the shards. Skywalker succeeded in securing the shards from the settlements, and the artifact was ground to dust and scattered to the solar winds.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Vor'Na'Tu first appeared in the Rebel Alliance campaign in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. Its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]] featured the original game's campaign, with enhancements. The Vor'Na'Tu shares the same model as the other game [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]]. The artifact was also mentioned in the [[2005]] reference book, ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.
